title: (Bullish Signal) FOXF, Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram just turned positive
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling FOXF's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. Tickeron's A.I. dvisor identified 40 similar cases where FOXF's MACD histogram became positive, and 31 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 78%. Current price $140.98 is above $133.78 the highest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 02/10/21 - 03/15/21, the price experienced a +1% Uptrend. During the week of 03/08/21 - 03/15/21, the stock enjoyed a +10% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/xz11lhevmfn61.png?width=1424&format=png&auto=webp&s=6bed86c595999b886816417f2de03a49afb178d3

​

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on March 11, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on FOXF as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 56 of 79 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 71%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for FOXF just turned positive on March 15, 2021. Looking at past instances where FOXF's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 31 of 40 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 77%.

The 10-day Moving Average for FOXF crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on November 02, 2020. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 11 of 15 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 73%.

Following a +2.90% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where FOXF advanced for three days, in 281 of 349 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 81%.

FOXF may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 245 of 326 cases where FOXF Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 75%.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/9937706-fox-factory-holding-s-foxf-139-23-moving-average-convergence-divergence-macd-histogram-just-turned-positive?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
